blockout_phase.note: One canonical mid-stride pose per direction; shared seed across directions for identity preservation.

future_animation_budget.note: 8 dir × (4 idle + 8 walk + 8 run + 6 attack + 3 hurt + 6 death + 5 cast) = 8 × 40 = 320 frames for a full Diablo-scale iso move-set. Per-character, one-time cost.

ernie_call_count.note: This round ships the 8-frame blockout only. Animation + rotation workflows expand the blockout into the full 320-frame sheet when they ship.
